text.title: Influencer Marketing Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: do not run this methodology; document skip rationale
switch default tier to micro for first 6 months
vet partners on match + engagement + bot ratio
rebuild outreach with content-reference + tailored pitch
launch program; monthly partner ROI review

text.example: preconditions=true → readiness gates evaluated → all_checks_pass==true → conclusion ref=roi-tracked-per-partner
